title: US missile hit military base near Iran school, video analysis shows
summary_full: A US Tomahawk missile hit a military base near a primary school in southern Iran where Iranian authorities said 168 people were killed, expert video analysis shows.
summary_public: A US Tomahawk missile hit a military base near a primary school in southern Iran where Iranian authorities said 168 people were killed, expert video analysis shows.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: US missile hit military base near Iran school
